Class PlacementStateProcessor

java.lang.Object
com.sk89q.worldedit.extent.AbstractDelegateExtent
com.fastasyncworldedit.core.extent.processor.PlacementStateProcessor
All Implemented Interfaces:
Filter, IBatchProcessor, Extent, InputExtent, OutputExtent, Pattern
public abstract class PlacementStateProcessor extends AbstractDelegateExtent implements IBatchProcessor, Pattern
Processor/pattern that uses Minecraft internal methods to determine the shape of blocks, e.g. stairs and fences
Since:
2.12.3

    getScope()
    Default to CUSTOM ProcessorScope as we want custom processors people add to be before we write history, but after FAWE does it's own stuff.

  • Constructor Details

    • PlacementStateProcessor

      public PlacementStateProcessor(Extent extent, BlockTypeMask mask, Region region)
      Processor/pattern for performing block updates, e.g. stair shape and glass pane connections
      Parameters:
      extent - Extent to use
      mask - Mask of blocks to perform updates on
      Since:
      2.12.3
